Auth.title: OCR Exam System
Auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
Auth.footer: Institutional access only. Contact your administrator for credentials.

Dashboard.overview: Overview of the Multilingual OCR system status and activity.
Dashboard.jobsDesc: Track, filter, and export data from handwritten exam sheets.
Dashboard.advancedReportingDesc: Generate comprehensive reports for entire exam sessions.
Dashboard.searchPlaceholder: Search by Job ID or Student...
Dashboard.uploadDesc: Upload scanned handwritten exam papers for automated OCR processing and extraction.
Dashboard.privacyDesc: Files are processed securely. Extracted data is linked to student IDs following academic privacy standards. No modifications are made to the original scans.
Dashboard.helpDesc: If you have issues with hand-writing recognition quality, try scanning in grayscale or higher DPI.
Dashboard.dropzoneDesc: Drag and drop your scanned exams (PDF, JPG, PNG) or click to browse. Max file size 10MB.
Dashboard.guidelinesIntro: For the best OCR accuracy, please ensure your scans follow these standards:
Dashboard.dpiGuideline: Minimum resolution of 300 DPI for handwritten text.
Dashboard.flatGuideline: Ensure the paper is flat and not wrinkled.
Dashboard.lightGuideline: Bright, even lighting without harsh shadows.
Dashboard.analyticsDesc: Track OCR performance metrics, language distribution, and processing trends.
Dashboard.weeklyVolumeDesc: Number of documents processed per day this week.
Dashboard.langDistributionDesc: Breakdown of processed documents by language.
Dashboard.confidenceByLangDesc: Average OCR confidence scores per language.
Dashboard.usersDesc: Manage system users, roles, and access permissions.
Dashboard.addUserDesc: Create a new user account for the OCR system.
Dashboard.addUserError: Failed to create user. Try again.
Dashboard.settingsDesc: Manage your profile, OCR preferences, and notifications.
Dashboard.thresholdDesc: Items below this threshold will be flagged for review.
Dashboard.notificationsDesc: Choose what you want to be notified about.
Dashboard.helpPageDesc: Find answers, documentation, and get support for the OCR system.
Dashboard.faqUploadQ: How do I upload exam sheets?
Dashboard.faqUploadA: Navigate to the Upload page, drag and drop your scanned exams (PDF, JPG, or PNG), then click Start Upload. The system will automatically process them through the OCR pipeline.
Dashboard.faqFormatsA: The system supports PDF, JPEG, and PNG files up to 10MB each. For best results, scan at 300 DPI or higher in grayscale.
Dashboard.faqConfidenceQ: What does the confidence score mean?
Dashboard.faqConfidenceA: The confidence score indicates how certain the OCR engine is about the extracted text. Scores above 90% are considered high quality. Items below 80% are automatically flagged for manual review.
Dashboard.faqLanguagesA: Currently the system supports Arabic, English, and French handwritten text recognition with mixed-language support.
Dashboard.faqSecurityA: All documents are processed securely with encryption. Data is linked to student IDs following academic privacy standards, and original scans are never modified.
Dashboard.stillNeedHelpDesc: Our support team is available to assist you with any questions or issues.
